_about: Unit (mobile suit / warship / identity card) display names. The per-unit master table holds one record per unit type; +0x00 is a pointer to the encoded name string. 'ptr' (present when the pointer was re-aimed at a relocated string) is what the builder writes; the string payloads live in the arena files. Entries without 'ptr' changed text in place behind an unchanged pointer. Entries may also carry stat overrides: carrier_capacity (u16 at +0x0D of the unit's master record) sets how many units a warship can carry; it is the spec/default value — existing saves bake their own per-group slot allocation.
